description: Read a ~50-line Python snippet and identify issues. Expected entities are short issue tags (sql-injection, race-condition, bare-except, unbounded-loop, etc.).
extractor_hint: Pull short kebab-case issue tags from the review (bare-except, mutable-default, missing-type-hint, resource-leak, etc.).

samples.prompt:
Review for issues:

```python
def get_user(conn, user_id):
    q = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}"
    return conn.execute(q).fetchone()
```
